description_long: This is a medium-sized, rounded rectangular storage box with a removable flat lid. The exterior is decorated with a repeating diamond harlequin pattern in muted pastel colors, primarily blue, orange, and beige, giving it a vintage or retro appearance. The box features a thin black trim along the edge of the lid and the upper rim, adding definition to its shape. On one side, there is a small rectangular label holder, likely for identification or organization purposes. The box appears to be made of a lightweight, rigid material such as cardboard or thin plastic, possibly with a fabric or paper overlay for the patterned finish. Small rivets or fasteners are visible on two sides, suggesting reinforced seams or structural support.
description: A pastel harlequin-patterned storage box with a removable flat lid, black trim, and a label holder on one side. The box is medium-sized, rounded rectangular, and likely made of lightweight rigid material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned surface and black trim, with no visible label or fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a row of small rivets or fasteners along the vertical seam, with the patterned surface and black trim.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a rectangular label holder near the bottom, along with the patterned surface and black trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a row of small rivets or fasteners, similar to view 1, and the same patterned surface.
